title: ANIRACETAM
description: Aniracetam is a fat-soluble racetam nootropic known for its anxiolytic and cognitive-enhancing properties. It modulates AMPA receptors and cholinergic transmission, potentially improving memory, learning, and reducing anxiety.

research.title: Aniracetam: its novel therapeutic potential in cerebral dysfunctional disorders
research.summary: Examines aniracetam's potential for treating CNS disorders using animal models.

research.title: Aniracetam: An overview of its pharmacodynamic and pharmacokinetic properties
research.summary: Reviews aniracetam's cognitive enhancement effects in elderly patients with Alzheimer's-related impairment.

research.title: Treatment of insomnia by concomitant therapy with Zopiclone and Aniracetam
research.summary: Combined Zopiclone and Aniracetam achieved 50%+ sleep duration increases in elderly patients.

research.title: Comparative kinetic studies and pH-rate profiling of aniracetam degradation
research.summary: Develops HPLC methodology for measuring aniracetam stability across varying pH conditions.

research.title: Aniracetam and DNQX affect the acquisition of rapid tolerance to ethanol in mice
research.summary: Investigates AMPA receptor involvement in ethanol tolerance development.

research.title: Sensitive and selective LC–MS/MS method for the quantification of aniracetam in human plasma
research.summary: Develops method for measuring aniracetam plasma levels with 0.2 ng/mL detection limit.

research.title: Postnatal aniracetam treatment improves prenatal ethanol induced attenuation of AMPA receptor-mediated synaptic transmission
research.summary: Demonstrates postnatal aniracetam reverses prenatal alcohol-induced cognitive deficits.

research.title: Development and validation of a liquid chromatographic method for the simultaneous determination of aniracetam
research.summary: Creates HPLC method with UV detection for identifying aniracetam and impurities.

research.title: Ameliorating effects of preadolescent aniracetam treatment on prenatal ethanol-induced impairment
research.summary: Shows aniracetam improves synaptic transmission and cognitive potential after prenatal ethanol exposure.

research.title: Determination of aniracetam's main metabolite, N-anisoyl-GABA, in human plasma by LC–MS/MS
research.summary: Develops efficient method for measuring aniracetam's primary metabolite in pharmacokinetic studies.

sentiment.summary: Users appreciate its dual cognitive and anxiolytic effects, finding it smoother than other racetams. Effects on creativity and verbal fluency are commonly noted.

effects.label: Short Half-Life:
effects.description: Requires multiple daily doses due to 1-2 hour half-life.

effects.label: Requires Choline:
effects.description: Best effects when stacked with a choline source.

dosage.label: With Fats:
dosage.description: Fat-soluble; best absorbed with dietary fat.

dosage.label: Choline Stack:
dosage.description: Often combined with Alpha-GPC or CDP-Choline.

sideEffects.label: Headaches:
sideEffects.description: Common if not taken with adequate choline.

sideEffects.label: Digestive Issues:
sideEffects.description: Some users report mild GI discomfort.

sideEffects.label: Generally Mild:
sideEffects.description: Side effects are typically minimal at normal doses.

availability.label: Prescription in Europe:
availability.description: Available by prescription in some European countries.

availability.label: Research Chemical:
availability.description: Sold as a research chemical in the US.
